I love new Grok video extension feature. Seedance 2.0 would generate it better, probably, but waiting couple of hours for single video is painful.

If you want original image I used for this generation, I'm uploading it in comments together with a prompt for nanobanana. For video https://t.co/Jx7Y02SXUk

Hollywood isn’t the future of filmmaking. Creators are. https://t.co/bghAu0k0ms

regarding the Seedance 2.0 video generation model

am I the only one who feels like we were given a dose of high-quality “drug,” got hooked, and then it was taken away?

now everything else feels like a surrogate for “joy”

in the test: the same prompt, the same reference image, https://t.co/K6aNR7AJM5

Seedance 2.0 loves structure: 
Start every prompt with [Style | Camera] → Setting → Timed actions (0-3s, 4-6s…). 
The more you storyboard, the less chaos you get.

Without structure, this is the result you get. https://t.co/tMKLOzqQSI

Insane.

Seedance 2 can now create epic VFX in one prompt. https://t.co/yLpgBNWaSj

Trying to improve my progress in between story with SeeDance 2.0. Motion Setting : High, Part 2 of the story took a while because rules changes with the prompt, something can't go too heavy for the audiences.

Less restrictive.
